creator: kristinacors
caption: You’ll regret the bill, not the stay 😏 #travelbucketlist #thehamptons #summerinthehamptons #hamptonshotels #luxuryhotels

transcription.text: Unlike the rest of us, sex, lies, and scandal never take a vacation. Instead, they take the Long Island Expressway and head east, to the Hamptons. Some would say summer is their busiest season.
